source_summary.candidate_role: BTS v4 canonical receipt/reasoning reconstruction engine candidate

results.detail: RuntimeError: BTS pipeline violation in turn T-INCOMPLETE: expected BTS_TOOL_RESULT, got BTS_COMMIT
RuntimeError: BTS T1: subprocess failed (rc=0). stdout='' stderr=''

findings.finding: BTS v4 subprocess receipt executes arbitrary commands and currently bypasses Stage6B pre_tool_action_gate_v1 unless wrapped.
findings.required_fix: Route produce_tier1_subprocess_receipt through ToolCallEnvelope_v1 and PolicyDecision_v1 before subprocess.run.

findings.finding: BTS_TOOL_SWITCH can be emitted before BTS_TOOL_SELECTION; custom audit marked switch_before_selection_rejected as FAIL.
findings.required_fix: Enforce switch only after selection and before execution/result, or explicitly define allowable switch lifecycle.

findings.finding: BTS writes to _bts/ and bts/bts_log.ndjson; these are not yet registered as canonical OS receipt/ledger surfaces.
findings.required_fix: Install BTS path registry binding and include these paths in export/receipt manifests before canonical use.

findings.finding: No active invariant index file was found by *ACTIVE*INVARIANT* search in live root during Stage6C, despite Stage6B invariant files existing.
findings.required_fix: Before BTS install, resolve invariant activation/index path consistency and bind BTS_REQUIRED invariant through the actual activation engine.

findings.finding: Self-test uses temporary root and does not test live OS layout, Stage6B gate integration, export inclusion, or new-chat boot from exported ZIP.
findings.required_fix: Add live-root and fresh-extract fixture tests in install stage.

findings.finding: Commit without BTS_TOOL_RESULT was rejected by pipeline violation during custom audit.
SHA chain was valid across generated log entries in custom chain test.

integration_plan_best_to_worst.scope: Create OS path registry for BTS, add BTS_REQUIRED invariant, install candidate under runtime/governance/bts/BTS_v4.py, wrap subprocess and file writes through Stage6B gate. Run unit fixtures only. No full export.
Patch switch lifecycle enforcement, add log chain verifier, add claim coverage fixtures, add implementation_reality fixtures, add negative tests. No broad export until tests pass.
Bind BTS logs/receipts into export manifest, run live-root smoke and fresh-extract smoke, then full OS authority export only if delivery guard passes.
Make shell/node/python/filesystem/export action helper adapters emit ToolCallEnvelope -> PolicyDecision -> BTS_TOOL_* records.
